title: Dispose objects a method creates and owns
messageFormat: Dispose this object before the method returns, or wrap it in a using statement.
summary: A local that holds a freshly created IDisposable owns that resource. If the method never disposes it, never returns it, and never hands ownership to another component, the underlying handle (file, socket, connection) leaks until the finalizer eventually runs, if ever.
Wrap the local in a using declaration or call Dispose on every exit path.
